title: autac_cryptic_pocket_cross_v1 — CROSS-AXIS J2 output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/autac_cryptic_pocket_cross.py. CROSS-AXIS integration J2: the AUTAC sub-axis (autophagic-flux degradation, autac_sim.py) is GATED by the CRYPTIC-POCKET sub-axis (apo open-state Boltzmann population, cryptic_pocket_sim.py). The AUTAC can only TAG target molecules in the warhead-binding-competent (open) conformation, so the autophagic degradation rate carries a hard conformational upper bound: degradation_rate_ceiling = P_open(target) * autac_sim.degradation_flux_per_min, with equality iff P_open = 1 (constitutively-open target). Both sub-axis libraries are IMPORTED, not re-implemented (AGENTS.tape f3 — no shadow of sister logic). The cross is a MODEL-LEVEL UPPER BOUND inequality only — NOT a quantitative degradation-rate prediction, NOT a binding-affinity / potency / therapeutic claim. AUTAC is itself RESEARCH-STAGE (Arimoto lab, Mol. Cell 76:797, 2019; no approved AUTAC drug). In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2). AUTAC remains a SUB-AXIS (:> BIFUNCTIONAL expansion-main); CRYPTIC-POCKET remains a SUB-AXIS (:> QUANTUM core); a CROSS is NOT a new axis.

target_pocket.description: Target pocket identifier inherited from the cryptic_pocket_sim deterministic panel.

pocket_class.description: Cryptic-pocket structural class label (e.g. cryptic_switch_pocket, cryptic_allosteric_pocket, constitutive_open_pocket).

pocket_drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the cryptic-pocket modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived). e.g. KRAS-G12C switch-II / sotorasib.

dg_open_kcal_per_mol.description: Cryptic-pocket conformational opening free energy closed->open (kcal/mol). >0 for a cryptic pocket; <=0 for constitutively-open.

dg_bind_open_kcal_per_mol.description: Intrinsic binding free energy to the already-open pocket (kcal/mol, <0 favourable).

dg_bind_obs_kcal_per_mol.description: Apparent binding free energy after paying the opening cost: dg_bind_obs = dg_bind_open + dg_open (the conformational free-energy ledger).

is_cryptic.description: True iff dg_open > 0 and apo_open_state_population < cryptic_popen_threshold (rarely sampled in apo state, hence invisible in apo crystal).

apo_open_state_population.description: Apo open-state Boltzmann population P_open = exp(-dg_open/RT)/(1+exp(-dg_open/RT)), computed by the imported cryptic_pocket_sim.open_population. The fraction of target in the AUTAC-warhead-binding-competent conformation.

cryptic_popen_threshold.description: Cryptic-pocket P_open classification threshold inherited from cryptic_pocket_sim (a pocket is CRYPTIC iff dg_open>0 and P_open < this).

autac.description: Paired AUTAC degrader identifier from the autac_sim deterministic panel.

autac_drug_precedent.description: Own precedent for the AUTAC modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived). AUTAC is research-stage; no approved AUTAC drug (Arimoto lab, Mol. Cell 76:797, 2019).

cargo_type.description: Cargo class degraded by selective autophagy (e.g. cytosolic-protein, fragmented-mitochondria, aggregate-prone-protein).

kd_target_nM.description: AUTAC-warhead binary dissociation constant for the open-state target (nM).

tag_competence.description: S-guanylation-tag -> K63-Ub/p62/LC3 engagement competence surrogate, in [0,1].

theta_target.description: Mass-action fractional occupancy of the target by AUTAC (autac_sim, at the operating AUTAC concentration).

k_seq_per_min.description: Cargo sequestration rate into a forming autophagosome (per min).

flux_partition.description: Autophagic-flux completion partition = k_fusion/(k_fusion+k_stall) (autac_sim). The fraction of autophagosomes whose lysosomal fusion completes — the central real-limit anchor of the AUTAC sub-axis (Mizushima & Yoshimori, Autophagy 3:542, 2007).

stalled_partition.description: Fraction of autophagosomes that stall without lysosomal fusion = k_stall/(k_fusion+k_stall). flux_partition + stalled_partition = 1 exactly.

flux_class.description: Autophagic-flux classification of the AUTAC by its flux partition (autac_sim).

degradation_flux_full_per_min.description: Full-engagement autophagic degradation flux = lc3_recruitment * k_seq * flux_partition (per min). The autac_sim degradation rate WITHOUT cryptic gating — the upper signal.

autophagic_flux_ceiling_fraction.description: The autac_sim flux_partition fraction exposed as a [0,1] bounded ceiling factor on the autophagic-flux-completion stage (independent of cryptic gating).

cryptic_gating_factor.description: The cryptic gating factor applied to the AUTAC degradation rate — numerically identical to apo_open_state_population. Multiplicative reduction vs full engagement.

degradation_rate_ceiling_per_min.description: Cryptic-gated AUTAC autophagic degradation-rate ceiling = P_open(target) * degradation_flux_full_per_min (per min). The cross's central output: a MODEL-LEVEL UPPER BOUND on the attainable AUTAC degradation rate given the cryptic-pocket conformational gate. NOT a quantitative degradation-rate prediction (g8/f2).

bound_inequality_holds.description: True iff degradation_rate_ceiling_per_min <= degradation_flux_full_per_min (the central inequality the cross asserts). Must hold for every row.

equality_at_constitutive_open.description: True iff the ceiling equals the full-engagement flux WHEN P_open = 1 (constitutively-open target); vacuously true otherwise. The cross asserts the inequality is tight (equality) only at P_open = 1.

interpretation.description: Plain-language statement of the cross: the AUTAC can only tag the open-state sub-population; the autophagic-flux degradation rate is therefore bounded above by P_open * autac_sim.degradation_flux_per_min — a strict model-level inequality from conformational selection.

illustrative_only.description: Always true — the row's degradation_rate_ceiling is a MODEL-LEVEL UPPER BOUND illustrating the conformational gate on AUTAC degradation, NOT a quantitative degradation-rate prediction. AUTAC is RESEARCH-STAGE (no approved AUTAC drug); the pocket-AUTAC pairing is a model coupling, not a real compound-target match.
